theory.canonical_statement: At the TZP the free energy undergoes an infinite-order phase transition: every derivative d\^{}n F/dT\^{}n is singular, and the partition function has an essential singularity that cannot be represented by a finite polynomial.
theory.technical_interpretation: At the TZP the free energy undergoes an infinite-order phase transition: every derivative d\^{}n F/dT\^{}n is singular, and the partition function has an essential singularity that cannot be represented by a finite polynomial.
